title: Cloud Data Warehouses Quiz
description: Test your BigQuery, Snowflake, and data warehousing knowledge.

questions.question: What is the key difference between OLTP and OLAP databases?

options.text: OLAP uses SQL; OLTP does not
OLTP is row-oriented for transactional operations; OLAP is columnar for analytics on large datasets
OLAP stores more rows than OLTP
They are identical — OLAP is just a newer term for OLTP

questions.question: What benefit does table partitioning provide in BigQuery?

options.text: Queries can skip entire partitions, scanning less data and reducing cost and latency
It compresses data into a smaller file
It splits the table across multiple BigQuery projects

questions.question: In a star schema, what is the purpose of a Fact table?

options.text: To store descriptive attributes about entities like customers and products
To store measurable events/transactions with foreign keys to dimension tables
To define relationships between dimension tables
